kept.title: Automated Verification of Soundness of DNN Certifiers.
kept.reason: Automates soundness verification of DNN certifiers using SMT solvers, directly linking formal methods (abstract interpretation) with AI model reliability.

kept.title: Laurel: Unblocking Automated Verification with Large Language Models.
kept.reason: LLMs generate assertions for Dafny program verifier, integrating AI with SMT solvers for formal verification.

kept.title: Artemis: Toward Accurate Detection of Server-Side Request Forgeries through LLM-Assisted Inter-procedural Path-Sensitive Taint Analysis.
kept.reason: Uses LLM-assisted taint analysis for SSRF vulnerability detection, integrating program analysis with AI.
